author: doll-agent
content:
Done. The existing 'empty_array' test was constructing a length-4 array of empty strings - not a true zero-element shape [0]. Zero-length arrays were never exercised through any ferray-strings op, leaving the length=0 edge case of every map/search/classify/concat path untested.

Added tests/empty_arrays.rs with 11 tests covering 1D and 2D zero-length construction, case ops, search ops, classify, concat::add, multiply, and search::count module path.

Each op produces zero-length output without panicking on first run. ferray-strings: 11 new integration tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 0c793bb1.
